---
title: "Utility Is in the Eye of the User"
description: "Ethayarajh and Jurafsky's critique of NLP leaderboards: a dynamic, user-weighted alternative."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-10-05"
categories: [NLP, paper, evaluation, conference, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Utility Is in the Eye of the User. Image from [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.13888).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

A dynamic leaderboard where every user can weight and filter based on stats (model size, energy efficiency, inference latency etc) of models!

Kawin Ethayarajh and Dan Jurafsky (2020). Utility is in the Eye of the User: A Critique of NLP Leaderboards. <https://lnkd.in/gj3TzTX>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_leaderboard-emnlp2020-nlp-activity-6718774774706921472-EA-G).*
